commit_message:
docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-453

Run: polaris-run-adopt-dry-run-fix-2026-07-04-001
Cluster: POL-453
Children: POL-454, POL-455
Files updated:
- POLARIS.md: 2 files
- SUMMARY.md: 2 files

- links repaired: 0

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Added editing-rule bullet documenting that `polaris adopt consolidate --dry-run` is a zero-write guarantee across migrateSmartDocs()/reconcileAgentFiles() (POL-454).
Documented new `polaris docs reformat-okf [--dry-run]` composed command in index.ts and its constraint never to touch agent instruction files (POL-455).

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Extended Current State/Key Constraints note with the consolidate --dry-run zero-write guarantee.
Added Key Behaviors bullet for the reformat-okf composed command.

evidence_summary: Cluster POL-453 (children POL-454, POL-455) fixed dry-run write gating in polaris adopt consolidate and added the polaris docs reformat-okf composed command. Both changes were operational constraints not yet reflected in cognition, so src/cli/POLARIS.md and src/cli/SUMMARY.md were updated to document the consolidate --dry-run zero-write guarantee, and src/smartdocs-engine/POLARIS.md and src/smartdocs-engine/SUMMARY.md were updated to document reformat-okf and its guarantee to never touch agent instruction files. No cognition notes, run report, or Medic charts existed for this cluster. Checked smartdocs/raw/ for candidate documents related to this work; none were found specific to the dry-run fix or reformat-okf, so no doc ingestion/promotion occurred. Root-level src/SUMMARY.md and src/POLARIS.md were reviewed and found still accurate, no change needed. All updates committed in a single librarian commit (058ce2f). No blockers.
